_meta.purpose: Pre-planned full repair cycle: implement → review → fix → re-review. Use when the task has known risk of issues. Codex templates had no equivalent — this is a Claude-origin addition.

model_strategy.quality: sonnet for implementer and fixer (write capability), haiku for initial review (fast gate), sonnet for re-review (must verify fix quality more carefully)
model_strategy.optimization: Fixer receives structured findings — no re-analysis of original task. Re-reviewer only checks fixed findings + regression, not full spec.
model_strategy.token_saving: Initial reviewer uses haiku + low reasoning (fast gate). Fixer gets only the findings list, not full task context. Re-reviewer scope is narrower than initial review.

improvements: New Pattern E: pre-planned repair cycle (no Codex equivalent)
Four-stage pipeline: implement → review → fix → re-review
Fixer receives only structured findings, not full task context
Re-reviewer has narrower scope than initial review (regression + fix verification only)
Optional watchdog hooks (Stage 1.5 + Stage 4.5, skipped during fix loop)

agents.name: loop-implementer
agents.mission: Create the deliverable with best-effort quality. A reviewer will inspect afterward.
agents.task:
Create or replace sample-output.txt containing exactly three lines:
Line 1: IMPLEMENT
Line 2: REVIEW
Line 3: ACCEPT
success_criteria: File exists with exactly 3 lines in the specified order
validation: Read the file back. Confirm 3 lines: IMPLEMENT, REVIEW, ACCEPT.
No trailing whitespace or extra content.
return_contract: File path, line count, per-line content.
PASS or FAIL per validation check.
stop_when: File created and validated. Stop immediately.

agents.name: loop-reviewer
agents.mission: Fast review to catch material issues before accepting. This is a gate, not a deep audit.
agents.task: Review sample-output.txt against spec: exactly 3 lines — IMPLEMENT, REVIEW, ACCEPT. Check for content correctness, extra whitespace, encoding issues.
validation: Lines match spec in order: IMPLEMENT, REVIEW, ACCEPT.
No trailing whitespace, BOM, or encoding artifacts.
return_contract: Findings: [line_number — expected — actual — severity] per issue.
stop_when: Verdict delivered. Do not modify files.

agents.name: loop-fixer
agents.mission: Fix ONLY the specific findings from the reviewer. Do not rewrite the file from scratch unless necessary.
agents.task: Read the reviewer's findings (provided by the supervisor). Apply the minimum edit to resolve each finding. Do not change anything that was not flagged.
validation: Confirm no regressions (lines not flagged are unchanged).
stop_when: All findings addressed. Do not optimize, refactor, or improve beyond the findings.

agents.name: loop-re-reviewer
agents.mission: Verify the fixer resolved all findings without introducing regressions. Narrower scope than initial review.
agents.task:
Re-review sample-output.txt. Focus on:
1. Each previous finding is now resolved.
2. No new issues introduced by the fix.
3. File still meets original spec: 3 lines — IMPLEMENT, REVIEW, ACCEPT.
return_contract: If MATERIAL_ISSUES after 2 cycles: escalate to supervisor.
stop_when: Final verdict delivered. Do not modify files.
